name: feature.campaign-channels.agents
description: Campaign Studio channel-generation agent pack (ADR 0157 / ADR 0014) — the Channel Generator, a manifest agent whose tools are feature.campaign-channels.nodes over the brief/kernel surfaces. Generates a single channel deliverable (landing page / ads / email / creative / social) grounded in the brief, from the AI chat. Tool-allowlisted to the channel-generation nodes only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Channel Generator
agents.description: Generates a single channel deliverable (landing page, ad variants, email sequence, creative briefs, or social posts) from a brief's messaging kernel — grounded in the KB and brand voice — and runs a content-quality check, via feature.campaign-channels.nodes. The human approves each draft.
